title: pilosella piloselliflora subsp. paxii
intro: Pilosella piloselliflora subsp. paxii, also known as the Alpine Mouse Ear, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Pilosella piloselliflora subsp. paxii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
